patch.value: Expose project profile application through MCP contracts and drift gates
When project profile commands land, expose the profile surface through MCP/contracts with schema snapshots and drift protection.

Profile application is exposed via pm_schema or a narrow profile MCP tool; tool schemas and command contracts include the new surface; contract snapshots, handshake tests, and negative tests are updated; pm contracts --command schema --schema-only --json remains green.

value.author: codex-pm-ecosystem-audit-20260625
value.text: Duplicate check: status-all MCP profile searches found closed schema/config MCP tooling but no profile application surface because profile commands do not exist yet.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Exposed profiles through MCP + contracts + drift gates (delivered together with pm-v37g in one PR). Added narrow pm_profile MCP tool (tools count 27->28; updated mcp-handshake.spec EXPECTED_TOOL_NAMES + length, smoke-claude-plugin.mjs required list + count, smoke-claude-plugin.spec list, CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN.md "28 tools", server prose narrow-tool list). Added "profile" action: PM_TOOL_ACTIONS + PM_CORE_COMMAND_NAMES entry, PM_TOOL_ACTION_SCHEMA_CONTRACTS.profile entry (required subcommand; optional name/dryRun/author/force; conditionalRequired name for show+apply) so contracts --full does not crash buildActionScopedToolSchema, PROFILE_FLAG_CONTRACTS + resolver case + contracts.ts command->flags map, tool-definitions.ts pm_profile inputSchema. Regenerated tests/fixtures/contracts/full.json (contracts:check green). MCP routing case "profile" in server.runAction (list/show/apply + unknown throw) covered by profile-command integration spec (incl nested-options path). contracts:check, quality:static, docs-skills, typecheck all green.
